title: artocarpus hirsutus
intro: Artocarpus hirsutus, also known as the balun-balun or beach mulberry, is a species of flowering plant in the family Moraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Artocarpus hirsutus include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of fever and cough. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and fruits are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
